Build binaries land here (fetched by build.ps1; not committed to git):

  ffmpeg.exe          — static Windows ffmpeg, bundled next to the app for audio
                        extraction from video.
                        (https://github.com/BtbN/FFmpeg-Builds/releases or
                         https://www.gyan.dev/ffmpeg/builds/)

  vc_redist.x64.exe   — Microsoft Visual C++ 2015-2022 x64 redistributable, run
                        silently by the installer when the machine lacks it
                        (required by ctranslate2 / onnxruntime).
                        (https://aka.ms/vs/17/release/vc_redist.x64.exe)

You can drop either file here manually instead of letting build.ps1 fetch it.
